solarFarm.title: Transformer Insulation Test
solarFarm.description: Performed insulation testing and installation of a 500 KVA step-up transformer for the main power network.

smartOffice.title: Main Breaker Maintenance
smartOffice.description: Complete maintenance of the main breaker to ensure safety and continuous power supply.

residentialSolar.title: Industrial Panel Installation
residentialSolar.description: Installed a distribution panel for an industrial site with optimized wiring and safety testing.

industrialUpgrade.title: Protection Test with OMICRON CMC630
industrialUpgrade.description: Verification and calibration of electrical protections using the OMICRON CMC630 system to ensure equipment reliability.

evCharging.title: DGPT2 Maintenance
evCharging.description: Maintenance of DGPT2 protection device on a transformer for improved thermal and dielectric monitoring.

greenCampus.title: Transformer Replacement with Main Switchboard
greenCampus.description: Replaced an old transformer and upgraded the main switchboard to improve site energy efficiency.
